'''Merwin Goldsmith''' was the voice of [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] in the [[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|radio adaptation]] of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']].
